channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: tirth8205/code-review-graph
item.description: 待翻译：Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows.
item.category: AI代理, 评估, 开发者工具, 可视化, 自动化

item.title: 1jehuang/jcode
item.description: 待翻译：The most intelligent agent harness for code

item.title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
item.description: 待翻译：Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 268+ providers (50+ free), 500+ models — Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi K3, GLM, DeepSeek. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, multimodal, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors.

item.title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
item.description: 待翻译：Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

item.title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
item.description: 待翻译：A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: kvcache-ai/ktransformers
item.description: 待翻译：A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations

item.title: jamiepine/voicebox
item.description: 待翻译：The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

item.title: topoteretes/cognee
item.description: 待翻译：Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, 记忆管理, 可视化

item.title: Robbyant/lingbot-map
item.description: 待翻译：A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

item.title: every-app/open-seo
item.description: 待翻译：Open source alternative to Semrush and Ahrefs

item.title: MoonshotAI/kimi-cli
item.description: 待翻译：Kimi Code CLI is your next CLI agent.

item.title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot
item.description: 待翻译：AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨
item.category: 开发框架, AI代理, 模型/LLM, 编辑器插件

item.title: PrefectHQ/fastmcp
item.description: 待翻译：🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
item.category: SDK/库, AI代理, 开发者工具

item.title: KnockOutEZ/wigolo
item.description: 待翻译：The go-to web for your AI coding agent — local-first search, fetch, crawl & research over MCP. No API keys, no cloud, $0/query. Public beta.

item.title: tokio-rs/topcoat
item.description: 待翻译：A batteries-included framework for building web apps

item.title: iptv-org/iptv
item.description: 待翻译：Collection of publicly available IPTV channels from all over the world

item.title: oblien/openship
item.description: 待翻译：Self-hosted deployment platform

item.title: microsoft/Ontology-Playground
item.description: 待翻译：Free, open-source web app for learning about ontologies and Microsoft Fabric IQ. Explore a catalogue of pre-built ontologies, design your own visually, export as RDF/XML, and share interactive diagrams. Zero backend, fully static.

item.title: handy-computer/transcribe.cpp
item.description: 待翻译：ggml speech-to-text inference for 16+ model families

item.title: moonshine-ai/moonshine
item.description: 待翻译：Very low latency speech to text, intent recognition, and text to speech, for building voice agents and interfaces
